title: Create Usability Testing Survey Form on WordPress
description:
Create a usability testing survey form using Gravity Forms on WordPress. The form questions are provided in an attached PDF and the form is embedded on the DataTools Pro website for user feedback collection.

Form managed at: WordPress admin Gravity Forms (form ID 15).
acceptance_criteria: Usability survey form created in Gravity Forms with all questions from the provided PDF
Form is embedded and accessible on the DataTools Pro website
implementation_notes: Form built using Gravity Forms WordPress plugin. Questions sourced from an attached PDF. Form embedded on a page of the marketing site.
comment_summary: Developer built the form and requested review for visual feedback.
